guruhub.name: GuruHub
guruhub.shortDescription: GuruHub is a full-stack Learning Management System (LMS) with backend services, an admin dashboard, and a mobile application.
guruhub.fullDescription:
Designed and implemented GuruHub, a full-stack educational platform including backend services, an admin dashboard, and a mobile application. Built backend services using cutting-edge Spring Boot 4.0.1 + PostgreSQL, exposing 168 secure REST APIs. Developed a Flutter mobile application and a web dashboard for administration and analytics. Implemented enterprise-grade mobile security, single-device session enforcement, and role-based access control. Deployed using Docker and CI/CD pipelines.

Note: GuruHub is currently in an internal testing phase. Please get in touch to be invited to the staging environment.
responsibilities: Designed and implemented GuruHub, a full-stack Learning Management System platform
Built enterprise-grade mobile security including freeRASP device integrity, Firebase App Check, SSL Pinning, and screenshot prevention
Built modular backend services using Spring Boot 4.0.1 (Spring Modulith) and PostgreSQL
Exposed 168 secure REST API endpoints for mobile and web clients
Implemented a commercial plan system with AOP-based feature gating (@RequiresCapability)
Built event-driven push notification system using Spring Application Events + Firebase Cloud Messaging
Designed quiz engine with deterministic randomization, timed attempts, and re-enrollment model
Implemented student progress tracking with real-time playback position sync and course completion analytics
Developed a Flutter mobile application following Clean Architecture
Developed a web dashboard using Vue 3 and Vuetify for administration and analytics
Implemented authorization with Spring Security roles + AOP plan capability on the backend and CASL on the frontend

technicalChallenges.solution: Deterministic shuffle using attempt ID as seed + unpublish guard blocking while live attempts exist
technicalChallenges.result: Students always see consistent question order on resume

technicalChallenges.problem: Single-device enforcement for students taking quizzes
technicalChallenges.solution: Built a device registration and validation flow using X-Device-Id headers and admin-approved device resets.
technicalChallenges.result: Prevented unauthorized account sharing and ensured academic integrity.

technicalChallenges.solution: Built AOP aspect with @RequiresCapability annotation + plan resolution chain (agency → user → denied)
technicalChallenges.result: Zero-code feature toggling per plan tier

technicalChallenges.problem: Cross-module data access in modular monolith
technicalChallenges.solution: Enforced module boundaries via PublicService interfaces + Spring Modulith dependency rules
technicalChallenges.result: Clean architecture with testable module contracts

technicalChallenges.solution: Integrated Shorebird for continuous OTA updates and freeRASP for device integrity checks.
technicalChallenges.result: Secure application with zero-downtime updates for critical fixes.

features: Course Builder with hierarchical sections/lessons + standalone & lesson-attached quiz engine
Admin home screen curation with featured content management
OAuth student authentication with single-device enforcement
Enterprise-grade mobile security (SSL Pinning, freeRASP, App Check)

seo.title: GuruHub | Full-Stack LMS Platform
seo.description: GuruHub is a comprehensive Learning Management System built with Spring Boot 4.0.1, Vue 3, and Flutter. Features multi-role capabilities, scalable architecture, and secure APIs.

3arabawy.name: 3arabawy
3arabawy.shortDescription: Car marketplace app for buying, selling, and renting vehicles, parts, and services.
3arabawy.fullDescription: A large-scale automotive marketplace supporting car sales, rentals, services, spare parts, and motorcycles, designed to handle heavy media usage and real-time interaction.
responsibilities: Designed and maintained scalable mobile architecture using Clean Architecture
Implemented listing systems for cars, services, parts, and motorcycles
Optimized performance for low-end devices
Collaborated closely with backend team on API contracts and improvements
Refactored image compression and networking to use native file streams, reducing RAM usage by ~98% and eliminating OOM crashes
Drastically reduced overall CPU/RAM overhead, ensuring a stable 60/120 FPS and a 30% smoother experience on low-end hardware
Guided backend architecture and API contract design to ensure optimal mobile-to-server data synchronization
Spearheaded the transition to a modular, event-driven Flutter architecture to handle complex app states more efficiently
Led the integration of a Socket.IO microservice

technicalChallenges.problem: OOM crashes and UI thread blocking during heavy image uploads.
technicalChallenges.solution: Refactored image pipeline to use native file streams and path-based compression (C++/Objective-C sub-workers) instead of Dart-side byte processing.
technicalChallenges.result: Reduced RAM usage by ~98% and eliminated synchronous jank, maintaining stable 60/120 FPS.

technicalChallenges.problem: Memory and rebuild optimization for media-heavy screens.
technicalChallenges.solution: Implemented modular event-driven architecture and optimized resource allocation.

technicalChallenges.problem: Arabic search normalization to handle Unicode inconsistencies.
technicalChallenges.solution: Applied Arabic normalization and removed diacritics.
technicalChallenges.result: Highly accurate and consistent Arabic search behavior.

technicalChallenges.solution: Removed heavy blur rendering from list views and moved rich rendering to preview screens.

seo.title: 3arabawy App | Car Marketplace Platform in Egypt
seo.description: 3arabawy is a car marketplace mobile application built with Flutter, allowing users to buy, sell, and rent cars, parts, and services across Egypt.

toltura.name: TOLTURA
toltura.shortDescription: Specialist discovery platform allowing users to find professionals.
toltura.fullDescription: Service discovery platform connecting users with specialists across multiple categories.
responsibilities: Expanded role beyond mobile development to influence core business decisions and directly optimize user flows
Collaborated on the .NET backend to implement and troubleshoot SignalR, ensuring a flawless real-time chat integration
Managed the end-to-end deployment lifecycle via CI/CD pipelines, publishing to the App Store and Google Play
Implemented specialist listing and filtering systems applying clean architecture

technicalChallenges.solution: Collaborated directly on the .NET backend to implement and demonstrate SignalR functionality.
technicalChallenges.result: Flawless real-time chat integration between the server and the Flutter client.

seo.title: TOLTURA | Specialist Discovery Platform
seo.description: TOLTURA is a mobile application for discovering specialists and professionals across various categories in Kyrgyzstan.

biznavi.fullDescription: Corporate HR management application designed for internal company workflows.
leadership: Acted as Tech Lead for the project

installment-app.name: Installment App
installment-app.shortDescription: Business utility application for managing merchant installment payments.
installment-app.fullDescription: Business utility application for managing merchant installment payments.
responsibilities: Directed a cross-functional team, acting as the primary liaison between UI/UX design, backend, and mobile development
Architected and developed the backend infrastructure using C# and .NET with Entity Framework and MSSQL
Deployed backend services via SmarterASP and launched the Android-exclusive client using Flutter
Implemented complex merchant workflows and installment calculation logic

technicalChallenges.problem: End-to-end product delivery across multiple stacks
technicalChallenges.solution: Managed full-stack architecture, building the Flutter client while simultaneously architecting and deploying the .NET/MSSQL backend.
technicalChallenges.result: Successful delivery and deployment of a cohesive merchant application.

seo.title: Installment App | Business Payment Utility
